user.title: Pimoroni Unicorn
user.description: Enter the Device ID configured in the firmware. Ensure the device is connected to the same MQTT broker as Home Assistant.

abort.invalid_discovery: The device's discovery message was invalid.

settings.title: Settings

data.extra_sensors: Extra sensors (one per line: entity_id topic_suffix)

data_description.extra_sensors:
Each line: entity_id followed by a topic suffix. Published to [device_id]/[topic_suffix] every 10 seconds.
Example:
sensor.indoor_temperature indoor_temp
sensor.co2 co2
data_description.show_panel: Adds the Unicorn Layout editor to the sidebar. Turn off to remove it; can be re-enabled here anytime.
data_description.orientation: Physical mounting rotation. 90°/270° turn a Galactic panel vertical (a different layout). Changing this reboots the device.
data_description.weather_code_entity: An OWM weather-code sensor, a sensor whose state/attribute is the code, or a weather.* entity (text condition). Temperature is read from its 'temperature' attribute if present.

settings.description: Device ID: {device_id} — set at setup and used as the unique ID; not editable here. Re-add the device to change it.

add_icon.title: Install LaMetric icon
add_icon.description: Enter a numeric icon code from the LaMetric gallery. The icon is fetched and previewed before installing.

icon_preview.title: Preview & name icon
icon_preview.description:
Icon {code} ({frames} frame(s)) — preview (shown at actual 8×8 size, zoom in if needed):

![icon]({url})

Choose a name to install it on all devices. The code {code} will also work as an alias in notifications.

import_layout.title: Import layout
import_layout.description: Paste a layout JSON authored in the emulator (scripts/emulate.py layout). It is stored by its name and pushed to this device.

toggle_widgets.title: Enable/disable widgets
toggle_widgets.description: Selected widgets are shown; unselected are hidden.

error.icon_not_found: No icon found for that code, or the gallery is unreachable.
error.name_taken: That name is already used by a built-in icon.
error.invalid_layout: Not a valid layout JSON (needs a "widgets" list).

send_notification.name: Send notification (guided builder)
send_notification.description: Build and send a notification with a guided form. Equivalent to the device's notify entity with the same options passed under data.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The Pimoroni Unicorn device to notify.

message.name: Message
message.description: Text to show (scrolls if it does not fit).

icon.name: Icon
icon.description: Name of an icon installed on the device, or a LaMetric gallery code. Install icons from the Unicorn panel or Configure → Install LaMetric icon.

icon_scale.name: Icon scale
icon_scale.description: Enlarge the icon by this factor (1–4). Useful on bigger displays (Cosmic/Stellar).

icon_position.name: Icon position
icon_position.description: Where the icon sits: left panel + text (default), centred (icon-focused, e.g. Stellar), or right.

sound.name: Sound
sound.description: Sound effect to play (audio models only).

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Minimum seconds to show (auto-extends to finish scrolling text).

color.name: Text colour
color.description: RGB colour for the message text (default white).

outlined.name: Outlined text
outlined.description: Draw a black outline around the text.

hold.name: Hold
hold.description: Keep showing until dismissed or replaced.

repeat.name: Repeat
repeat.description: Number of full scroll passes for overflowing text.

stack.name: Stack
stack.description: If off, replace the current notification immediately.

wakeup.name: Wake up
wakeup.description: Show even while the display is asleep.

dismiss_notification.name: Dismiss notification
dismiss_notification.description: Dismiss the active notification on a Pimoroni Unicorn display.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The Pimoroni Unicorn device to dismiss on.

show_page.name: Show page
show_page.description: Pin a specific page on a device, or clear the pin to resume the playlist.

index.name: Page index
index.description: Zero-based index of the page to show.

name.name: Page name
name.description: Name of the page to show (instead of index).

clear.name: Resume playlist
clear.description: Clear the pinned page and resume the playlist.

set_playlist.name: Set playlist
set_playlist.description: Define a device's playlist from named pages and how it cycles.

pages.name: Pages
pages.description: Names of saved pages to cycle through, in order.

dwell.name: Dwell (seconds)
dwell.description: Seconds to show each page before advancing (0 disables cycling).

push_firmware.name: Push firmware to device
push_firmware.description: Stage firmware files and send an OTA update command over MQTT. The device validates, writes, and reboots automatically.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: Which device to update. Leave empty to push to every configured device.

files.name: Files to push
files.description: Which firmware files to push (defaults to main). Bare names get .py appended and land in the device root.

file_content.name: Inline file content
file_content.description: Optional map of file key to content string, used instead of reading from disk.

no_device.message: No Pimoroni Unicorn device was found for the selected device.

no_page_target.message: Specify a page index or name, or set clear to resume the playlist.

no_matching_pages.message: None of the requested pages exist: {pages}.

no_notify_content.message: Provide at least a message, icon, or effect.

reflash_required.title: Pimoroni Unicorn needs a USB reflash
reflash_required.description: The engine on {device} predates the foldered file layout (1.1.0) and can't update over the air. Reflash the firmware/ tree once via USB (Thonny); OTA works afterwards.

icon_oversize.title: Icon too big for the display
icon_oversize.description: The icon “{icon}” ({size}) is larger than this device's screen ({screen}), so it will be clipped. Re-import it at the device size or use a smaller icon.

icon_truncated.title: Animation trimmed to fit
icon_truncated.description: The icon “{icon}” animation was trimmed to {kept} of {total} frames to fit the device's memory budget. Reduce its size or frame count to keep the whole animation.

widget_overflow.title: Widget runs off the screen
widget_overflow.description: The “{widget}” widget on the current page extends past the {screen} display and will be clipped. Move or resize it.
